title: Better Netherite
description: A very WIP mod to improve the experience of finding and using netherite.
body:
# Better Netherite

A very WIP mod to improve the experience of finding and using netherite.

## Features:

- New Item: Nether Star Dust (1x nether star => 4x nether star dust)
- New Item: Bonding Agent (1x nether star dust + 2x magma cream => 2x bonding agent)
- New Recipe: 1x Netherite Smithing Template + 2x Bonding Agent + 6x Diamong => 1x Netherite Smithing Template
- And more (coming soon)!

## Compatibility:

- Fabric (Snapshots & when 1.20 comes out)
- Forge (When 1.20 comes out)
- Quilt (When 1.20 comes out)

## Versioning:

The versioning/release system is as follows:

- Manual releases: `[loader]-v[version]+mc[minecraft version]`
- CI builds: `[loader]-v[version]+mc[minecraft version]+[commit]`

## Notes:

This mod is still in alpha! There WILL be bugs! Please use with caution!

## Contributing:

Please feel free to contribute and create issues for bugs, feature requests, and changes!
